# pai restore

> Restore from a backup directory (created by pai backup)

## Synopsis

```
pai restore [backup-path] [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Kind |
|----------|------|
| `[backup-path]` | optional |

## Options

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--no-postgres` | Skip restoring the Postgres database |  |
| `--yes` | Skip confirmation prompt (non-interactive) |  |
